file_changes: feat(qrcode): open cinema mode in a clean new tab with giant QR code
- Refactored toggleCinemaQR() in ui.js to export the generated QR code canvas as a data URL and open it in a clean, dedicated new tab using window.open().
- The new tab has a modern glass-inspired styling matching the dark/light theme background, displaying a giant, crisp QR code (78vmin) inside a premium white shadow card.
- Displays the raw QR content text below the QR code in a small, low-opacity label (1.1rem) for context.
- Removed legacy cinema-mode CSS selectors from layout.css and residual references in features.js and ui.js.

git_diff:
commit bd8a49f5484134c39ab4839566c2bd50b3f934ff
Author: Helder Tou├ºas (DMRH/DDF/CQ) <helder.toucas@cm-lisboa.pt>
Date:   Tue Jun 23 18:29:02 2026 +0100

    feat(qrcode): open cinema mode in a clean new tab with giant QR code
    
    - Refactored toggleCinemaQR() in ui.js to export the generated QR code canvas as a data URL and open it in a clean, dedicated new tab using window.open().
    - The new tab has a modern glass-inspired styling matching the dark/light theme background, displaying a giant, crisp QR code (78vmin) inside a premium white shadow card.
    - Displays the raw QR content text below the QR code in a small, low-opacity label (1.1rem) for context.
    - Removed legacy cinema-mode CSS selectors from layout.css and residual references in features.js and ui.js.

 proj-multifile-v2/features.js |  1 -
 proj-multifile-v2/layout.css  | 47 ----------------------
 proj-multifile-v2/ui.js       | 90 ++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++-
 3 files changed, 88 insertions(+), 50 deletions(-)
